regime_reason: S&P 500, Nasdaq, and Dow are all at or near record highs (Dow above 53,000) on a strong week of gains, with VIX around 16.3, a calm/low volatility reading.
notes: Held position VMAR (42 sh @ $1.41) did a 1-for-10 reverse split on June 17 to avoid Nasdaq delisting, and a top insider (HRT Financial LP) sold ~$52k of shares on July 2 -- both material red flags despite the insider-buy signal that originally triggered the position; financials remain weak with ~9.3x debt/equity. Broader market is at records but rotating out of tech into healthcare/financials, so tech-heavy candidates should be discounted for now.
